subject: Path of Shadows
fact: The Path of Shadows is an underground passage of dark, murky, warm water about five feet deep.
source_quote: An underground passage of dark, murky, warm water about five feet deep

subject: Path of Shadows
fact: The passage is fed by a stream connecting to a larger lake of shadows.
source_quote: fed by a stream connecting to a larger lake of shadows

subject: Path of Shadows
fact: A five-foot-wide tunnel within the passage leads to Solom Ned'razak's private office.
source_quote: featuring a five-foot-wide tunnel that the party swam through for about 40 feet, leading to Solom Ned'razak's private office

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is a male Drow wizard.
source_quote: A male Drow wizard

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Office
fact: Solom Ned'razak's office is a private area within a large cave along the Path of Shadows.
source_quote: A private office area within a large cave along the Path of Shadows

subject: Solom's papers
fact: The office contains papers detailing Solom's research and observations about the Blink event, the faerzress, demons, and Lolth's clerics.
source_quote: containing a lamp and papers detailing Solom's research and observations about the Blink event, the faerzress, demons, and Lolth's clerics

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is a former drow metropolis now a city of fire and ash.
source_quote: A former drow metropolis now a city of fire and ash

subject: Maerimydra
fact: The city is nestled in a titanic cavern 600 feet tall at its highest point.
source_quote: nestled in a titanic cavern 600 feet tall at its highest point

subject: Demonic evil forces
fact: Maerimydra is controlled by demonic evil forces aligned with Graz'zt.
source_quote: It is controlled by demonic evil forces aligned with Graz'zt

subject: Maerimydra
fact: The city features huge buildings and plateaus 100 feet high connected by 100-foot-wide grand stairs.
source_quote: The city features huge buildings, plateaus 100 feet high connected by 100-foot-wide grand stairs

subject: Maerimydra
fact: A thick smoke layer exists above 250 feet in Maerimydra.
source_quote: a thick smoke layer above 250 feet

subject: Maerimydra
fact: The city is lit by numerous burning braziers creating a heavy charcoal scent.
source_quote: lit by numerous burning braziers creating a heavy charcoal scent

subject: Inhabitants of Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is inhabited by fire giants, ogres, hellhounds, drow slaves, and demons.
source_quote: inhabited by fire giants, ogres, hellhounds, drow slaves, and demons

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: The Six-Fingered Courtyard is a courtyard on a raised plateau in the western section of Maerimydra.
source_quote: A courtyard on a raised plateau in the western section of Maerimydra

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: The courtyard is surrounded by black spires bearing a prominent six-fingered symbol of Graz'zt.
source_quote: surrounded by black spires bearing a prominent six-fingered symbol (of Graz'zt)

subject: Worship at Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: Demons and giants gather at the Six-Fingered Courtyard to worship a demon lord.
source_quote: Demons and giants gather here to worship a demon lord

subject: Fiendish giant manager
fact: One of the fiendish giants manages the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: one of the fiendish giants manages it

subject: Coliseum
fact: The Coliseum is a massive structure dominating the southern end of the residential district in Maerimydra.
source_quote: A massive coliseum dominating the southern end of the residential district in Maerimydra

subject: Gladiator fights
fact: Great gladiator fights occur at the Coliseum.
source_quote: where great gladiator fights occur

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fiendish giant who is in charge of the Coliseum.
source_quote: Veperyd, a fiendish giant, is in charge of it

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd manages the betting pool at the Coliseum.
source_quote: and manages the betting pool

subject: Eastern Castle
fact: The Eastern Castle is a castle on a plateau in the eastern side of Maerimydra.
source_quote: A castle on a plateau in the eastern side of Maerimydra

subject: Eastern Castle
fact: The castle has two towers stretching from floor to ceiling.
source_quote: with two towers stretching from floor to ceiling

subject: Hledh
fact: The Fire Giant Queen Hledh resides in the Eastern Castle.
source_quote: The Fire Giant Queen Hledh resides here

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a tower in Maerimydra where Vraxen resides.
source_quote: A tower in Maerimydra where Vraxen (the Yugoloth) resides

subject: The book
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning contains the book the party seeks.
source_quote: It contains the book the party seeks

subject: Teleportation circle
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning contains a teleportation circle.
source_quote: and a teleportation circle

subject: Dinner event
fact: A dinner event is scheduled to occur at The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A dinner event is scheduled to occur here

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is a loyal companion to the party.
source_quote: A loyal companion to the party

subject: Combat at Black Ember Outpost
fact: The Owlbear participated in combat against ogres at the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: who participated in combat against ogres at the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Combat in Maerimydra
fact: The Owlbear participated in combat in Maerimydra.
source_quote: and in Maerimydra

subject: Owlbear rescue
fact: The Owlbear helped Bramgrim and Felkur stay afloat in deep water by allowing them to ride on its back.
source_quote: Helped Bramgrim and Felkur stay afloat in the deep water by allowing them to ride on its back

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: The party discovered Solom Ned'razak's private office and notes in the Path of Shadows.
source_quote: whose private office and notes were discovered by the party in the Path of Shadows

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom's writings revealed his efforts to subvert Lolth's clerics in Maerimydra.
source_quote: His writings revealed his efforts to subvert Lolth's clerics in Maerimydra

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom's writings included theories on the 'Blink' event in the faerzress.
source_quote: his theories on the 'Blink' event in the faerzress

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom's writings included observations on the appearance of demons.
source_quote: his observations on the appearance of demons

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom's writings included notes about Lolth's clerics regaining their powers.
source_quote: and his notes about Lolth's clerics regaining their powers

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom blamed powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the Blink.
source_quote: He blamed powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the Blink

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom wished the Blink had been his idea.
source_quote: and wished it had been his idea

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom initially sought accommodation with demons but realized they only caused chaos and destruction.
source_quote: He initially sought accommodation with demons but realized they only caused chaos and destruction

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap is an imp with a barbed tail and a bloodstained satchel.
source_quote: An imp (devil) with a barbed tail and a bloodstained satchel

subject: Pipyap rescue
fact: The party rescued Pipyap from four ogres in Maerimydra.
source_quote: rescued by the party from four ogres in Maerimydra

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap is knowledgeable about Maerimydra's layout, inhabitants, and key figures.
source_quote: He is knowledgeable about the city's layout, inhabitants, and key figures

subject: Pipyap contract
fact: Pipyap made a contract with the party to provide information and assistance in exchange for his safety.
source_quote: He made a contract with the party to provide information and assistance in exchange for his safety

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap was brought to the prime material plane by a magic user's mistake.
source_quote: He was brought to the prime material plane by a magic user's mistake

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap has a strong desire to avoid returning to the Nine Hells.
source_quote: having found loopholes in his previous contracts to remain free

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap complained about the lack of salt in the party's food.
source_quote: He complained about the lack of salt in the party's food

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap enjoys being on the prime material plane.
source_quote: and enjoys being on the prime material plane

subject: Hledh
fact: Hledh is the Fire Giant Queen who rules Maerimydra.
source_quote: The Fire Giant Queen who rules Maerimydra

subject: Hledh
fact: Pipyap advises the party to stay away from Hledh.
source_quote: Pipyap advises the party to stay away from her

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fiendish giant who runs the Coliseum in Maerimydra.
source_quote: A fiendish giant who runs the Coliseum in Maerimydra

subject: Veperyd
fact: Pipyap describes Veperyd as 'a bit of an idiot'.
source_quote: Pipyap describes him as 'a bit of an idiot'

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd has been stealing money from Vraxen.
source_quote: who has been stealing money from Vraxen

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd's theft makes him a potential target for creating a distraction.
source_quote: making him a potential target for creating a distraction

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is a Yugoloth who resides in The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A Yugoloth who resides in The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: The book
fact: Vraxen possesses the book the party is seeking.
source_quote: He possesses the book the party is seeking

subject: Vraxen and Veperyd arrangement
fact: Vraxen has a business arrangement with Veperyd regarding the Coliseum's betting pool.
source_quote: has a business arrangement with Veperyd regarding the Coliseum's betting pool

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a High Inquisitor of Mulmaster.
source_quote: A High Inquisitor of Mulmaster

subject: Veris travel
fact: Veris has travelled to attend the dinner at Vraxen's residence.
source_quote: who has travelled to attend the dinner at Vraxen's residence

subject: Veris
fact: Veris intends to acquire the book the party seeks.
source_quote: where he intends to acquire the book the party seeks

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is secretly hunting Felkur.
source_quote: Secretly hunting Felkur

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a rival buyer for the tome.
source_quote: he is a rival buyer for the tome

subject: Party deadline
fact: Veris sets the party's deadline to steal the book before the dinner concludes.
source_quote: and sets the party's deadline — they must steal the book before the dinner concludes

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt is a demon lord who controls Maerimydra and Hillsfar.
source_quote: A demon lord who controls Maerimydra and Hillsfar

subject: Graz'zt deal with giants
fact: Graz'zt made a deal with the giants to imbue them with fiendish blood.
source_quote: He made a deal with the giants to imbue them with fiendish blood

subject: Graz'zt brings in Vraxen
fact: Graz'zt brought in Vraxen to ensure his plans are carried out.
source_quote: and brought in Vraxen to ensure his plans are carried out

subject: Six-fingered symbol
fact: Graz'zt's symbol is a six-fingered hand.
source_quote: His symbol is a six-fingered hand

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: The six-fingered hand symbol is prominently displayed at the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: prominently displayed at the six-fingered courtyard

subject: Worship at Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: Demons and giants worship Graz'zt at the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: where demons and giants worship him

subject: Lolth
fact: Lolth is the Drow goddess whose clerics were unable to commune with her for some time.
source_quote: The Drow goddess whose clerics were unable to commune with her for some time

subject: Lolth powers return
fact: Lolth's powers returned after 'the Blink'.
source_quote: Her powers returned after 'the Blink'

subject: Lolth escape
fact: Lolth used 'the Blink' event to escape imprisonment.
source_quote: an event she used to escape imprisonment

subject: Lolth's clerics
fact: Lolth is now reestablishing her power and organizing her clerics.
source_quote: She is now reestablishing her power, organizing her clerics

subject: Lolth's clerics
fact: Lolth is extracting revenge on those who stopped being faithful to her.
source_quote: and extracting revenge on those who stopped being faithful to her

subject: Potion of Flying
fact: A Potion of Flying was found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: A magical potion found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Potion of Fire Giant Strength
fact: A Potion of Fire Giant Strength was found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: A magical potion found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Coral Gemstones
fact: Coral Gemstones were found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: Gemstones found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Coral Gemstones
fact: The Coral Gemstones are valued at a total of 400 gold pieces.
source_quote: valued at a total of 400 gold pieces

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Notes
fact: Solom Ned'razak's Notes are papers found in Solom Ned'razak's private office.
source_quote: Papers found in Solom Ned'razak's private office

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Notes
fact: The notes contain Solom's research, theories on the 'Blink' event, observations about demons, and notes about Lolth's clerics.
source_quote: containing his research, theories on the 'Blink' event in the faerzress, observations about demons appearing after the Blink, his attempts to make deals with demons, and notes about Lolth's clerics regaining their powers after being silent

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Notes
fact: The notes included Solom's complaints about not thinking of the Blink idea himself.
source_quote: The notes also included his complaints about not thinking of the Blink idea himself

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Notes
fact: The notes included Solom's blame of powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan.
source_quote: and his blame of powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan
